target: Item 21 Note Families - PF Franchising LLC

note_families.title: Nature of business and summary of significant accounting policies
key_facts: Company is a single-member LLC, disregarded entity for federal/state tax purposes
Securitization Transaction completed Aug 1, 2018
Management Agreement: annual fee = $20,000 fixed + $18/franchised club + $40/corporate club
Revenue recognition: royalties as franchise sales occur; franchise fees straight-line over term; ADA fees apportioned to each FA
Intangible assets: trade/brand names (indefinite-lived) + customer relationships (12-year amortization)
No impairment charges recorded in any period presented
No tax provision for US federal income taxes (disregarded entity)

note_families.title: Guarantees and other commitments and contingencies
subsections: Long-term debt issued by Master Issuer
key_facts: Securitized Senior Notes outstanding:
- 2019 Notes: 3.858% fixed, $550M initial principal
- 2022 Variable Funding Notes: up to $75M revolving
Total securitized debt: ~$2.25B at issuance
2018 Class A-2-II Notes prepaid June 2024, replaced by 2024 Notes at higher rates
All Company assets pledged as security
No material legal proceedings expected to have adverse effect

note_families.title: Intangible assets
key_facts: Trade and brand names: $146,300K (indefinite-lived, no amortization)
Customer relationships: $88,400K gross, fully amortized ($88,400K accumulated) as of Dec 31, 2024
Net intangible assets: $146,300K (2024) vs $152,582K (2023) — decrease due to final year of customer relationship amortization
Amortization expense 2024: $6,282K (final year)
12-year weighted-average amortization period for customer relationships

note_families.title: Deferred revenue
key_facts: Total deferred revenue: $32,586K (2024) vs $32,528K (2023)
Composition: ADA fees $13,783K, franchise fees $10,514K, transfer fees $7,663K, grace period fees $626K
Current portion: $3,801K; long-term: $28,785K

note_families.title: Related party transactions
key_facts: Dividends to Parent: $306,900K (2024), $280,536K (2023) — exceeds net income, funded by cash from operations
Management fees to Holdings: $41,425K (2024), $38,710K (2023)
Due to affiliates (net): $1,349K (2024), $686K (2023)
Assetco royalty rate: 7%; recognized $36,198K royalty revenue (2024), $33,586K (2023)
Assetco other franchise revenue: $3,652K (2024), $4,122K (2023)
Former interim CEO of PF Inc. (board member) has financial interest in a franchisee — deferred ADA revenue of $134K (2024); recognized franchise revenue $4,448K (2024)
Pla-Fit Canada license: 5% royalty (royalty-free brand license, 99-year term)
PF International license: ~1.67% royalty (99-year term)
No consideration exchanged for amended licensing agreements; no book value recorded

note_families.title: Subsequent events
key_facts: Evaluated through April 7, 2025
No items to disclose
